name: Q-8 honest scope behavior: validate script returns non-zero on a README that omits the solo-scale caveat
command: echo "# Project" > /tmp/q8-readme.md; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/honest-scope-validate.sh" --readme /tmp/q8-readme.md 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && echo flags_missing 1>&2
